hero.title: Reliable Supply with 25 Years of Experience
hero.sub: We serve enterprise customers with industrial supply, safety consumables, and contract-driven fulfilment. Transparent operations, measurable service, and long-term partnership are what we build every day.

about.title: About
about.intro: Since 1999, we have been offering consistent quality, a reliable supply chain, and flexible solutions. We continue to expand into razors, building materials, and new categories. Today, we are especially strong in gloves and PPE supply.

trust.title: Reliable Supply
trust.text: Approved suppliers and process discipline you can count on.

fast.title: Fast Delivery
fast.text: Planned stock and shipping for predictable lead times.

categories.title: Product Categories
categories.subtitle: Browse by category. More categories coming soon.

gloves.name: Gloves
gloves.desc: Nitrile, latex, cut-resistant, and industrial work gloves.

satisfaction.title: Customer satisfaction
satisfaction.text: Customer satisfaction is at the center of our business. We collect feedback, feed it into our operations, and act quickly on fixes. With regular review and open communication, we keep satisfaction trending upward and renew trust for long-term B2B partnerships, order after order.

feedback.title: Feedback & follow-up
feedback.text: Fast response to your requests, plus action plans to improve recurring pain points.

clear.title: Clear communication
clear.text: Predictable, transparent information across ordering and delivery milestones.

improve.title: Continuous improvement
improve.text: We raise the bar with training, supplier quality reviews, and periodic target tracking.

reviews.title: Customer reviews
reviews.subtitle: Short notes from companies we’ve worked with since 1999. (Sample testimonials)

footer.line: A trusted B2B partner in supply, safety, and consumables for 25 years.

about.title: About us
about.p1: Mavi Yapı has served enterprise customers for over 25 years with supply and supply-chain solutions. Transparency, on-time shipment, and long-term partnerships are our focus.
about.p2: We started with PPE and gloves, and we use the same scale and professionalism to add new categories (e.g. razors, building materials).
about.p3: For orders, quotes, and technical questions, use the form or our WhatsApp line.

contact.title: Contact
contact.p: Use the form below or WhatsApp. We usually reply quickly.
